/home/forge/opt/cross/bin/x86_64-elf-gcc -nostdlib -T/run/media/forge/D649-CD2F/CNOS/linker.ld CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/entry.asm.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/interrupts.asm.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/gdt_load.asm.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/console.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/sysinfo.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/multiboot.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/pmm.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/vmm.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/gdt.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/idt.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/isr.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/power.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/drivers/ttfont.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/shell.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/ipc.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/fs/vfs.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/fs/cnos/cnos_alloc.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/fs/cnos/cnos_ext2.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/fs/cnaf/cnaf_validate.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/drivers/vga.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/drivers/font.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/drivers/graphics.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/drivers/serial.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/drivers/pci.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/drivers/ide.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/fs/cnos/cnos_ext2_vol.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/process.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/elf_load.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.elf.dir/kernel/user.c.obj hello_elf.o -o kernel.elf
